summary: Adds dedicated Eldritch Warden/Golem entities, shared TC4 boss adapter, boss title/name generation, champion boss whitelist/persistence, and closer champion attribute modifier parity.
ported: TC4 EntityEldritchWarden title table, title NBT, spawn absorption, champion name generation
TC4 EntityEldritchGolem headless NBT, lethal headless transition, beam charge adapter
TC4 EntityUtils BOLDBUFF and MIGHTYBUFF UUID modifier semantics
TC4 ConfigEntities boss whitelist mirror for eldritch_warden and eldritch_golem

gradle_build.details: Gradle wrapper tried to download gradle-7.5.1-bin.zip from services.gradle.org.

next_stage: Stage216 should focus on dedicated Warden/Golem render/model parity, EntityEldritchOrb/ranged attack parity, golem boss beam/arc FX packets, and Outer Lands boss-room/key-room spawn metadata.
